states.PENDING: TVL has received the ARI-approved trade and is running validations
states.VERIFIED: All 6 validation categories passed. Webhook may be transmitted.
states.REJECTED: One or more validation rules failed. Webhook must NOT be transmitted. Record in Observatory.
states.DELAYED: Validation cannot be completed yet (e.g., waiting for bar close confirmation). Retry on next bar.
states.EMERGENCY_BLOCK: A critical safety condition detected (e.g., duplicate position, broker disconnect). All trading halted until manual review.

rule: Only VERIFIED state may result in webhook transmission. All other states must suppress execution.
